message:
🐛 Add partial coverage warning to compliance score card (#2801)

When not all clusters are reporting compliance data, shows a yellow
warning: "Partial coverage — X of Y clusters reporting. Score may
not reflect full cluster state."

This prevents users from being misled by a score that silently
excludes unreachable clusters from the calculation.

Fixes #2766

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1006,6 +1006,17 @@ export function ComplianceScore({ config: _config }: CardConfig) { {CARD_DESCRIPTIONS.compliance_score.description} + {/* Partial coverage warning — not all clusters are reporting */} + {!isDemoData && !usingFallback && allChecked && totalChecking > 0 && scoreClusters.length < totalChecking && ( +
+ + + Partial coverage — {scoreClusters.length} of {totalChecking} clusters reporting. + Score may not reflect full cluster state. + +
+ )} + {/* No compliance tools installed — show install prompt instead of fake demo score */} {noToolsInstalled && (
